query: soft focus dreamy hazy out of focus portrait
message: sub:intentional_blur/soft_focus — anti_aesthetic — dreamy hazy out-of-focus portraits, vaseline lens, soft veil

response.objective_caption: A monochromatic image featuring soft, diffused gray tones layered against a pale background, with darker pigment concentrated along one curved edge and gradually lightening toward the opposing side, creating an amorphous silhouette reminiscent of a human profile turned slightly away from the viewer.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred, indistinct monochrome image where all fine detail dissolves into soft, smeared gradients of gray, presenting an abstracted, ghost-like form that vaguely suggests a human profile viewed through obscured glass or vapor, with no clear resolution of features, surfaces, or spatial depth.
